variants: Anahera Parata is a prominent figure in the field of hydrogeology, acclaimed for her innovative device, the Atlas Vein Extractor. Her groundbreaking work was made possible through generous support from the Moonlit Pinnacle Society, a primary funding source for her research endeavors.
